---
title: "RUN_ME"
author: "Anouk Bouma"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Run Shiny App

To run the Shiny app, the file needs to be prepared using the document 'Systematic_review_pipeline.qmd. The filename that you used for the batch of articles that needs to be evaluated needs to be filled out at the top of the next codeblock:

```{r}
# Define path for loading and saving data
data_file <- "801-1200_reviewername.rds"

library(shiny)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)

abstract_phrases <- c("simulate", 
                      "simulated", 
                      "simulation", 
                      "simulating", 
                      "monte carlo",
                      "monte-carlo",
                      "simulations",
                      "numerical experiment",
                      "numerical experiments")


# Load data (replace with your actual data loading code)
if (file.exists(data_file)) {
  input_data <- readRDS(data_file)
} else {
  stop("Data file not found. Please ensure evaluation file exists.")
}

# -------------------------------
# 1. UI with a fixed navigation panel (with two rows) and centered content
# -------------------------------
ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Systematic Review Article Screening"),
  
  fixedPanel(
    top = 0, left = 0, right = 0, height = "140px",
    style = "background-color: white; z-index: 1000; padding: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc;",
    
    # First row: header
    fluidRow(
      column(12, h4("Export Inclusion Decisions"))
    ),
    
    # Second row: navigation controls
    fluidRow(
      column(2, actionButton("prev_page", "Previous Page")),
      column(2, actionButton("next_page", "Next Page")),
      column(2, actionButton("next_unscreened", "Next Unscreened")),
      column(2, actionButton("save_inputs", "Save")),
      column(2, numericInput("jump_page", "Jump to page:", 
                               value = 1, min = 1, step = 1, width = "80px")),
      column(2, actionButton("go_page", "Go"))
    ),
    
    # Third row: current page info
    fluidRow(
      column(12, textOutput("page_info"))
    )
  ),
  
  # Main content with top margin so it doesn't get hidden under the fixed panel.
  tags$div(
    style = "margin-top: 150px; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px; max-width: 900px;",
    uiOutput("article_reports")
  )
)

# -------------------------------
# 2. Server with “start where I left off” functionality, manual saving, and page jump
# -------------------------------
server <- function(input, output, session) {
  articles_per_page <- 1
  
  # Create reactive values to store the data and the current page.
  inclusion_decisions <- reactiveValues(
    data = input_data,
    current_page = 1  # default; will update below
  )
  
  # Set the starting page to the page that has the first incomplete article.
  # An incomplete article is defined as one where none of the checkboxes
  # (included, excluded, second_reviewer) are checked and no note is entered.
  {
    incomplete <- which(
      (!input_data$included) &
      (!input_data$excluded) &
      (!input_data$second_reviewer) #&
      #(is.na(input_data$note) | input_data$note == "")
    )
    if (length(incomplete) > 0) {
      first_incomplete <- min(incomplete)
      inclusion_decisions$current_page <- ceiling(first_incomplete / articles_per_page)
    } else {
      inclusion_decisions$current_page <- 1
    }
  }
  
  # Compute total number of pages
  total_pages <- reactive({
    n_articles <- nrow(inclusion_decisions$data)
    ceiling(n_articles / articles_per_page)
  })
  
  # Observers to update the current page when the navigation buttons are clicked.
  observeEvent(input$next_page, {
    if (inclusion_decisions$current_page < total_pages()) {
      inclusion_decisions$current_page <- inclusion_decisions$current_page + 1
    }
  })
  
  observeEvent(input$next_unscreened, {
  articles <- inclusion_decisions$data

  # Loop through articles starting from the current page + 1
  start_index <- inclusion_decisions$current_page * articles_per_page + 1
  next_unscreened <- which(
    (!articles$included) &
    (!articles$excluded) &
    (!articles$second_reviewer) #&
    #(is.na(articles$note) | articles$note == "")
  )
  
  # Find the first incomplete article after the current one
  next_index <- next_unscreened[next_unscreened >= start_index][1]
  
  if (!is.na(next_index)) {
    inclusion_decisions$current_page <- ceiling(next_index / articles_per_page)
  } else {
    showNotification("No more unscreened articles found.", type = "message")
  }
})
  
  
  observeEvent(input$prev_page, {
    if (inclusion_decisions$current_page > 1) {
      inclusion_decisions$current_page <- inclusion_decisions$current_page - 1
    }
  })
  
  # Observer for the "Go" button to jump to a specified page.
  observeEvent(input$go_page, {
    req(input$jump_page)
    new_page <- as.integer(input$jump_page)
    if (new_page >= 1 && new_page <= total_pages()) {
      inclusion_decisions$current_page <- new_page
    } else {
      showNotification("Invalid page number", type = "error")
    }
  })
  
  # Update the numeric input so it reflects the current page.
  observe({
    updateNumericInput(session, "jump_page", 
                         value = inclusion_decisions$current_page,
                         min = 1, max = total_pages())
  })
  
  # Display current page information.
  output$page_info <- renderText({
    paste("Page", inclusion_decisions$current_page, "of", total_pages())
  })
  
  # Render the articles for the current page.
  output$article_reports <- renderUI({
    articles <- inclusion_decisions$data
    current_page <- inclusion_decisions$current_page
    
    # Compute the start and end indices for the current page.
    start_index <- (current_page - 1) * articles_per_page + 1
    end_index <- min(nrow(articles), start_index + articles_per_page - 1)
    current_articles <- articles[start_index:end_index, ]
    
    # Build UI for each article in the current subset.
    lapply(seq_len(nrow(current_articles)), function(i) {
      global_index <- start_index + i - 1
      article <- current_articles[i, ]
      keyword_df <- article$keyword_data[[1]]
      
      # Bold abstract keywords by replacing the abstract phrases.
      bold_abstract <- article$abstract
      for (kw in abstract_phrases) {
        pattern <- paste0("\\b", kw, "\\b")
        bold_abstract <- str_replace_all(bold_abstract,
                                         regex(pattern, ignore_case = TRUE),
                                         paste0("<strong>", kw, "</strong>"))
      }
      
      tagList(
        h3(article$title),
        p(
          strong("DOI Link: "),
          tags$a(
            href = article$`DOI Link`,
            target = "_blank",
            article$`DOI Link`
          )
        ),
        p(strong("DOI:"), article$DOI),
        h4("Abstract"),
        p(HTML(bold_abstract)),  # Render HTML for bold formatting
        
        # Display keyword matches if available, or a message otherwise.
        if (!is.null(keyword_df) && nrow(keyword_df) > 0) {
          tagList(
            h4("Keyword Matches"),
            lapply(unique(keyword_df$keyword), function(kw) {
              contexts <- keyword_df$context[keyword_df$keyword == kw]
              tagList(
                h4(kw),
                tags$ul(
                  lapply(contexts, function(context) {
                    tags$li(HTML(str_replace_all(context,
                                                  fixed(kw),
                                                  paste0("<strong>", kw, "</strong>"))))
                  })
                )
              )
            })
          )
        } else {
          h4(HTML("<span style='font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold; font-style: italic;'> No Keywords found for this article. </span>"))
        },
        
        # Checkboxes for decisions (using a global index for input IDs)
        checkboxInput(paste0("include_", global_index), "Include in review", article$included),
        checkboxInput(paste0("exclude_", global_index), "Exclude from review", article$excluded),
        checkboxInput(paste0("second_reviewer_", global_index), "Second reviewer", article$second_reviewer),
        
        # Text area for notes
        textAreaInput(
          inputId = paste0("note_", global_index),
          label = "Notes:",
          value = article$note,
          width = "100%",
          rows = 10
        ),
        
        hr()
      )
    })
  })
  
  # Observer to update and save decisions/notes when the user navigates pages.
  observeEvent(c(input$next_page, input$prev_page), {
    articles <- inclusion_decisions$data
    # Loop through all articles to update if an input exists.
    for (i in seq_len(nrow(articles))) {
      if (!is.null(input[[paste0("include_", i)]]))
        articles$included[i] <- input[[paste0("include_", i)]]
      if (!is.null(input[[paste0("exclude_", i)]]))
        articles$excluded[i] <- input[[paste0("exclude_", i)]]
      if (!is.null(input[[paste0("second_reviewer_", i)]]))
        articles$second_reviewer[i] <- input[[paste0("second_reviewer_", i)]]
      if (!is.null(input[[paste0("note_", i)]]))
        articles$note[i] <- input[[paste0("note_", i)]]
    }
    inclusion_decisions$data <- articles
    saveRDS(inclusion_decisions$data, data_file)
  })
  
  # Observer for the Save button.
  observeEvent(input$save_inputs, {
    articles <- inclusion_decisions$data
    # Loop through all articles to update if an input exists.
    for (i in seq_len(nrow(articles))) {
      if (!is.null(input[[paste0("include_", i)]]))
        articles$included[i] <- input[[paste0("include_", i)]]
      if (!is.null(input[[paste0("exclude_", i)]]))
        articles$excluded[i] <- input[[paste0("exclude_", i)]]
      if (!is.null(input[[paste0("second_reviewer_", i)]]))
        articles$second_reviewer[i] <- input[[paste0("second_reviewer_", i)]]
      if (!is.null(input[[paste0("note_", i)]]))
        articles$note[i] <- input[[paste0("note_", i)]]
    }
    inclusion_decisions$data <- articles
    saveRDS(inclusion_decisions$data, data_file)
    showNotification("Inputs saved!", type = "message")
  })
}

shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)



```
